name: Erosion Lotion Lathering
outcome: Dark Perpetua's long thick gooey tendrils lunge out and gropingly roll across your body in a languid massaging caress, the slimy appendages coating your skin in a depravedly tingly lotion that makes your heart race and your cock throb...
miss: Dark Perpetua's long thick gooey tendrils lunge out and attempt to gropingly roll across your body in a languid massaging caress, but you manage to evade them!
statusOutcome: The slimy glistening aphrodisiac seeps into your skin, flooding you with sinful heat while tingly bliss oozily radiates all over you...
